User.title: User
User.description: Represents an authenticated patient user registered in HealthSaathi

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth identifier of the user

email.description: Primary verified email address of the user

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the profile was registered

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a clinic or video-consultation appointment booked with a healthcare provider

id.description: Auto-generated document ID for the booking

userId.description: Unique user ID of the patient booking the appointment

userEmail.description: Email address of the booking patient

userName.description: Full name of the booking patient

specialty.description: Medical specialty of the target doctor

hospital.description: Hospital/clinic where the session takes place

date.description: Date of the appointment in YYYY-MM-DD format

time.description: Time slot of the appointment (e.g., 10:00 AM)

status.description: Current systemic status of clinical check

fees.description: Professional OPD fee rate in INR

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: Represents a dynamic secure channel thread established between a Patient User and a Doctor

patientId.description: The authenticated paciente user auth UID reference

doctorName.description: Direct name representation of the health consultant

lastMessage.description: Last sent or received encrypted text block preview

lastMessageTime.description: Date tag in clinical workspace clock format

unreadCount.description: Number of received but un-read message cards in this channel

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a standalone secure clinical chat bubble transmitted within a secure medical channel

patientId.description: The authenticated paciente user auth UID reference

users/{userId}.description: User profiles root documents storing basic credentials and system role registration

bookings/{bookingId}.description: Appointment items root level collection linked to patient identifiers

conversations/{conversationId}.description: Clinical active messages threads tracking channels setup

messages/{messageId}.description: Standalone message items for full conversational channels
